prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为15952→27993→14840→12389→17416，波动较大；2022年因省控线大幅下降等因素位次骤降至27993，2023–2024年回 升至14840和12389，2025年因新高考改革分物理类/历史类后位次回落至17416，近3年整体呈后移趋势，2025年基准约17416名；该校在陕西物理类招生计划2021 年98人、2022年104人、2023年106人、2024年105人、2025年105人；2026年计划134人，较2025年扩招约27.6%，扩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争压力有所缓解，位次数字 应增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第73名，近年排名在60–73之间波动，整体处于中上211水平，在石油石化领域具有行业标杆地位；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音综合热度未进入全国前106名，短视频曝光量一般，报考关注度处于中等水平；该校以石油与天然气工程、地质资源与地质工程等为传统优势领域，相关专业在行业内认可度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年陕西 物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；电气、电子信息、计算机等工科专业社会热度持 续偏高，对相关专业报考有拉动作用；该校位于山东青岛，属跨省招生；在陕西招生计划占比较小（约百余人），地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次17416、2026年大幅扩招约27.6%使位次后移、以及陕西物理类考生增加约19.7%使竞争加剧，两因素部分对冲；考虑扩招幅度大于考生增幅，位次整体后移但 幅度受限。预测2026年最低位次约18802名，区间18302–19302名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 15952 → 27993 → 14840 → 12389 → 17416, showing significant fluctuations; in 2022, due to a sharp drop in the provincial control line and other factors, the ranking plummeted to 27993, then rebounded to 14840 and 12389 in 2023–2024, and in 2025, after the new college entrance examination reform dividing into Physics/History categories, the ranking fell back to 17416, with an overall backward trend in the recent 3 years, and the 2025 baseline is approximately 17416; the university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi for Physics Category was 98 in 2021, 104 in 2022, 106 in 2023, 105 in 2024, and 105 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 134, an increase of about 27.6% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, theoretically easing competitive pressure and increasing the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 73rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with recent rankings fluctuating between 60 and 73, overall at an upper-middle level among 211 universities, holding an industry benchmark position in the petroleum and petrochemical field; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; its Douyin comprehensive popularity has not entered the national top 106, with average short video exposure and moderate application attention; the university has traditional advantages in petroleum and natural gas engineering, geological resources and geological engineering, and related majors are highly recognized in the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, with a significant expansion in examinee scale and intensified competition; social popularity for engineering majors such as electrical, electronic information, and computer science remains high, driving applications for related majors; the university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, and is a cross-provincial enrollment; the enrollment plan in Shaanxi accounts for a small proportion (about a hundred people), so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 17416, the significant expansion of about 27.6% in 2026 causing a backward shift in rankings, and the increase of about 19.7% in Shaanxi Physics Category examinees intensifying competition, the two factors partially offset each other; considering the expansion rate is greater than the examinee growth rate, the ranking will shift backward overall but with limited magnitude. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 18802, with a range of 18302–19302.

This university is a 211 with industry characteristics, and graduates in petroleum and petrochemical fields have stable employment channels, suitable for candidates interested in the energy industry.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 73rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings; among science and engineering institutions, its humanities and social sciences majors are relatively small in scale, but it still holds some appeal due to the 211 platform; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity is average, with moderate application attention; the university is primarily engineering-focused, and its liberal arts majors (Law, Accounting, Chinese Language and Literature, English, Economics) are not its traditional strengths.

专业热度与地域.text: Located in Qingdao, Shandong, it is a cross-provincial enrollment; the liberal arts enrollment plan is only about 10 people, a small scale, and regional preference has limited impact on rankings; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Shaanxi is about 88,500, an increase of about 17.0% from 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition; social popularity for liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature is relatively high, while Accounting/Finance categories show divergence and wait-and-see.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 2873, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 18.2% which shifts the ranking backward, and the increase in Shaanxi History Category examinees by about 17.0% which intensifies competition, the two factors largely offset each other; considering the expansion slightly exceeds the examinee increase, the ranking will shift slightly backward.
